content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team_size(6) ∧ devops(part_time) ∧ timeline("4_months") ∧ data_store("PostgreSQL")
H: suitable_for_modest_traffic ∧ faster_initial_deployment ∧ eases_collaboration ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: build_principal_features_as_modular_components → focus_on_common_data_store → prepare_for_future_services_split
R: ! potential_scalability_limitations ∧ ! technical_debt_with_integration ∧ ! resource_constraints_with_devops
A: default_architecture ∧ short_justification

[AUDIT]
Decision aligns with team's capabilities and project timeline.

structured_data.audit: Decision aligns with team's capabilities and project timeline.

content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team(6) ∧ part_time_DevOps ∧ timeline("4months") ∧ traffic("modest") ∧ database("PostgreSQL")
H: simplicity ∧ faster_time_to_market ∧ shared_database ∧ future_split_possible ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: develop_initial_release → future_refactor_to_microservices
R: ! scalability_issues ∧ ! potential_technical_debt
A: opt_for_modular_structure

[AUDIT]
Choose modular_monolith under team(6), part_time_DevOps and keep the path to future decomposition open.
